Free the internet from data collection with Mullvad VPN – a service that helps keep your online activity, identity, and location private. Only €5/month. 

GET STARTED
1. Install the app.
2. Create an account.
3. Add time to your account via in-app purchases, vouchers or on our website.

To make sure to block third-party cookies and other tracking technologies – use Mullvad VPN together with Mullvad Browser (free of charge).
